prompts.SessionStart: reel-to-reel tape threading through heads and beginning warm playback hiss, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
prompts.SessionEnd: tape machine stopping with characteristic pitch-dropping slowdown, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
prompts.Stop: analog tape reaching splice point with warm flutter and gentle stop, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
prompts.PreToolUse: tape rewind accelerating with rising magnetic whir before playback, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
prompts.PostToolUse: tape punch-in recording captured with satisfying magnetic click, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
prompts.PermissionPrompt: tape loop reaching decision point with warbling hesitant wobble tone, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
prompts.IdlePrompt: blank tape running through heads with soft continuous hiss and hum, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
prompts.SubagentStart: tape dubbed onto second deck creating parallel running copy, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
prompts.SubagentStop: overdub layer completing and folding back into main tape mix, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: tape fast-forwarding with bright chattering speed before snapping to play, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay
